steps.title: Shake the Agencourt AMPureXP bottle to fully resuspend magnetic particles
steps.instruction: Shake the Agencourt AMPureXP bottle to fully resuspend magnetic particles.

steps.title: Add sample Vol µL × 1
steps.instruction: Add sample Vol µL × 1.8 (or less i.e. 0.8) of the Agencourt AMPure XP solution. Pipette mix 10 times, or vortex a few seconds.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes. 00:05:00

steps.title: Place the reaction plate/tube onto an...
steps.instruction: Place the reaction plate/tube onto an Agencourt SPRIPlate Super Magnet Plate for 2 minutes to separate beads from solution. 00:02:00

steps.title: Aspirate the supernatant from the reaction plate/tube and discard
steps.instruction: Aspirate the supernatant from the reaction plate/tube and discard.

steps.title: Dispense 200 µL of 70% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Dispense 200 µL of 70% ethanol and incubate at room temperature for at least 30 seconds. Aspirate out the ethanol and discard. Repeat for a total of two washes. undetermined, 70% ethanol 00:00:30

steps.title: Leave plate to dry for ca
steps.instruction: Leave plate to dry for ca. 15-20 min. at room temperature. 00:15:00

steps.title: Add at 40 µL elution buffer...
steps.instruction: Add at 40 µL elution buffer (10 mM Tris buffer, no TE!!) Volume can be lower, in the past even 20µL worked, but then it is harder to get the purified sample out of the plate/tube. Pipette mix 10 times or vortex a few seconds. undetermined, elution buffer

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 2 minutes. 00:02:00

steps.title: Place the reaction plate onto an...
steps.instruction: Place the reaction plate onto an Agencourt SPRIPlate Super Magnet Plate for 1 minute to seperate beads from solution. 00:01:00

steps.title: Transfer purified product to a fresh...
steps.instruction: Transfer purified product to a fresh plate or PCR tube (better than 1.5mL tubes, as you can use a multichannel pipette for quantification!).
